name: ExportJob
description: ExportJob schema from TM Forum API

allOf.description: Represents a task used to export resources to a file

completionDate.description: Data at which the job was completed

contentType.description: The format of the exported data

creationDate.description: Date at which the job was created

errorLog.description: Path to file or stream where errors encountered during the job processing can be written

path.description: URL of the root resource acting as the source for streaming content to the file specified by the export job

query.description: Used to scope the exported data

url.description: URL of the file containing the data to be exported
